commit.message:
Enable think_mode to preserve native COT in model responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix permissions, auto-close, Slack notifications, and cron schedule

Permissions (ticket-permissions.ts):
- Rewrote validateTicketUpdate to be clean and correct
- Any user who can VIEW a ticket can now do operational updates
  (status, assigneeId, tags, slaStatus) without errors
- CX subDepartment restriction now only blocks editing core fields,
  not status/assignee changes — fixes Sadia and all Associate/Agent roles
- Removed the "unknown fields" error that was blocking legitimate updates

Auto-close (storage.ts, routes.ts, ticket-detail.tsx):
- Added autoCloseResolvedTickets() — closes tickets 24h after Solved
- Runs fire-and-forget on every GET /api/tickets (real-time)
- Also runs in daily cron at 10:30 AM PKT
- Closed is terminal: PATCH blocked on Closed tickets
- "Closed" removed from manual status dropdown in UI
- Lock banner shown on Closed ticket detail page

Slack notifications (slack-web-api.ts):
- sendSlackTicketCreated now matches the new compact message format
- Added .trim() to all env var channel ID reads

Slack reporter (slack-reporter.ts):
- Removed sendDailyReport() from automated cron and button flows
- runFullDailyReports() now awaits before responding (prevents lambda kill)
- Cron updated to 10:30 AM PKT (30 5 * * *)

Status transitions (routes.ts):
- New → Solved now allowed (was previously blocked)
- resolvedAt auto-stamped on Solved, cleared on re-open

Cron (vercel.json):
- Schedule updated from 0 3 * * * to 30 5 * * * (10:30 AM PKT)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace cookie-based bridge state with JWT-encoded state parameter

Cookies set on redirect responses don't survive cross-domain redirect
chains on Netlify serverless. Instead, encode the bridge state (PKCE
verifier, ERPNext redirect URI, state) as a signed JWT in the OAuth
state parameter, which Supabase passes back unchanged in the callback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Tmux-based agent detection with CPU status, per-agent spinner, Monoid for menu title

commit.message:
feat: AI Agent全面升级 - 人性化交互与情绪检测优化

主要改进：
1. 交互风格重塑
   - 统一产品名为「心境」，消除「心语」引用
   - 新增朋友式+妈妈式风格融合模板
   - 移除身份声明式表述和机械化表达

2. 会话稳定性修复
   - 实现带TTL过期机制的Orchestrator缓存
   - 增强LLM服务错误处理和智能降级

3. 情绪检测优化
   - 重构关键词词库为分层结构(strong/moderate/mild/colloquial)
   - 添加口语化/网络用语支持(emo了、破防了、麻了等)
   - 实现否定词检测功能
   - 区分物理疲劳和情绪性疲劳

4. 问卷评估自然化
   - 增强症状检测的否定语境理解
   - 添加失眠、睡不着等关键词

5. 双重能力模式切换
   - 新增ConversationMode枚举(CASUAL/ASSESSMENT/CRISIS)
   - 实现智能模式判断和无缝切换

6. BERT模型集成

feat(spec): add 4 evaluation facets + schema-to-contract reinforcement

Add security/auth/authorization, side effects/idempotency, external
contract fidelity, and operational readiness as detailed evaluation
facets. Expand Schema design facet to explicitly cover public-facing
contracts derived from storage schemas. Remove "Security & trust
boundaries" from one-liners (now a full facet).

Sourced from analysis of 17 PR review agents — these 4 represent
design-level gaps that belong at spec time, not implementation time.

commit.message:
feat: initial implementation of order processing system

Distributed order processing system built with .NET 8, Kafka (KRaft),
PostgreSQL, Clean Architecture, CQRS, DDD and Stateless state machine.

Services: OrderProducer (S0), OrderIntake (S1), PaymentService (S2),
OrderOrchestrator (S3), StockService mock, PaymentGateway mock.

Tests: 28 unit + 11 integration (Testcontainers + WireMock.NET) + 3 E2E.
Infrastructure: Docker Compose with Kafka KRaft and PostgreSQL (3 databases).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(agent): enable AMAZON.UserInput to prevent orchestration loop

Without the AMAZON.UserInput action group, Nova Lite enters an infinite
orchestration loop when it needs to ask the user for missing information
(e.g. refund amount/reason). The model correctly identifies user::askuser
as the next action, but since the action group isn't registered, Bedrock
falls back to repeated KB lookups (~227 trace events, ~107s timeout).

Changes:
- Add AMAZON.UserInput action group to agent module
- Update tool-001 test to include confirmation turn (askuser prompts
  before processing the customer ID swap)
- Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and docs/ATTACK_SCENARIOS.md with correct
  scenario misconfigurations and new technical discovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(provider): Word-boundary Matching verhindert falsche Provider-Erkennung

detectProvider() nutzte includes() für displayName/keywords, was "ING" in
jedem deutschen Wort mit "ing" (Kündigung, Wohnung etc.) fand.
Jetzt: Alle Matches mit \b Word-Boundaries + Minimum-Score auf 20 erhöht.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: make Color Blindness and Visual Memory test tiles visible

Add display:flex to .color-tile and .vm-tile buttons so that
aspect-ratio:1 properly sets tile height. Without explicit display,
buttons default to inline-block where aspect-ratio fails to
generate height in grid context (zero-height tiles = invisible).
